title: Tactile socket locating outlet cover
abstract: A tactile socket outlet cover (10) which has a faceplate (12), a locating area (14), and a locating track (16), which locating track (16) is used for guiding a user in a tactile manner from the locating track (16) to the socket (18) of the outlet (17). The locating area (14) or areas are attached to the faceplate (12) at either or both of its top and bottom edge (20, 22), and the locating tracks (16) extend from the distal edges (34) of the locating areas (14) to the precipice (38) of a hole (36) of the faceplate (12) for accommodating the receptacle (37) of the outlet (17).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS The invention claimed is: 1. A tactile socket locating outlet cover which comprises: a) a faceplate; b) at least one locating area; and c) at least one locating track; wherein said faceplate is for being a cover for an outlet on a wall or the like; wherein said at least one locating area is proximally connected to said faceplate; wherein said at least one locating track is a track extending between said locating area and said faceplate. 2. The cover of claim 1 wherein the outlet covered by said faceplate has at least one socket therein; and wherein said at least one locating track corresponds to the at least one socket of said outlet so that a user can trace from said at least one locating area to the at least one socket of the at least one outlet in said at least one locating track. 3. The cover of claim 2 wherein said faceplate has a top edge and a bottom edge; and wherein said at least one locating area is proximally connected to said faceplate along at least one of said top edge and said bottom edge. 4. The cover of claim 3 wherein said at least one locating track comprises at least two locating tracks; wherein said at least two locating tracks correspond to two sockets of said outlet; and wherein said at least two locating tracks are parallel. 

The cover of claim 3 wherein said faceplate has a height from the wall; wherein said at least one locating area has a height from the wall; and wherein said height of said faceplate is higher than the height of said locating area. The cover of claim 5 wherein said locating area comprises a border; wherein said border comprises all edges of the locating area which are not proximally connected to said faceplate; and wherein said border is raised. The cover of claim 6 wherein said border of said locating area is the same height as said faceplate. The cover of claim 7 wherein said at least one locating track has a height from the wall; and wherein said height varies within the length of said at least one locating track. The cover of claim 8 wherein said at least one locating area has a distal edge; wherein said distal edge of said locating area is opposite the connection of the faceplate to the locating area; wherein said faceplate has at least one hole for accommodating a receptacle of the outlet; and wherein said at least one locating track extends from said border of said locating area on said distal edge of said at least one locating area to the precipice of said at least one hole for accommodating a receptacle of the outlet. 

The cover of claim 9 wherein said at least one locating track varies in height from the wall along its length; wherein said height from the wall of said at least one locating track is lower than the height from the wall of said locating area when said at least one locating track is in said at least one locating area; and wherein said height of said at least one locating track matches the height of said faceplate at he precipice of said at least one hole for accommodating a receptacle of the outlet . The cover of claim 4 wherein said at least one locating area comprises two locating areas; wherein said at least two locating tracks comprise two pairs of locating tracks; and wherein said two locating areas are located on each of said top edge of said faceplate and said bottom edge of said faceplate . The cover of claim 11 wherein said locating areas have widths ; wherein said faceplate has a width; and wherein said width of said locating areas is greater than the width of said faceplate. The cover of claim 11 wherein said locating areas have widths; wherein said faceplate has a width; and wherein said width of said locating areas is equal to the width of said faceplate.
